title: 8in1 Triple Flavour Bones XS - chewy dog bones with chicken fillet, pork hide and beef hide, 7 pcs.
description: From the manufacturer 8in1 Triple Flavour 3 irresistible flavours in 1 chewy bone! Why 8in1 Triple Flavour? 8in1 Triple Flavour Bones The 8in1 Triple Flavour range of delicious rawhide chewy bones made with pork hide and beef hide, wrapped with chicken fillet to keep your dog busy. Long Lasting Chewing Fun Treat your trusted best friend with these irresistible 8in1 Triple Flavour Bones which are low in fat, rich in protein with no added sugar, flavour enhances, GMO's or artificial preservatives. Supporting Healthy Teeth These delicious long-lasting chewable bones are also great for your dog's teeth and gums and promote overall dental hygiene by reducing tartar build-up through the natural chewing action. product_details_tab_data.Title: 8in1 Triple Flavour Bones XS - chewy dog bones with chicken fillet, pork hide and beef hide, 7 pcs.
product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: Teeth Care & Mental Stimulation for Dogs
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Helps dental health and provides natural protein nutrition
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Composition: beef hide (43%), chicken breast (17%), pork hide (17%), rice, glycerol, tapioca starch, sodium chloride, sorbitol. Analytical Constituents: protein 86%, fat content 3%, crude fibre 0.8%, crude ash 3%. Additives: colourants.
